activeWorkPackage.title: Ricco visual-master contract and first review candidate

summary: LR0 Truth Reset, LR1 pilot selection, LR2 Studio Foundation rescue, LR3 neutral production-loop rescue and LR4 selected-pilot fire test are publicly verified and closed. Das Zimmer remains the selected pilot. LR5 visual, set and voice locks is the only active gate. LR5.1 is the single active work package: the source-bound Ricco visual-master contract is ready for human review, while image generation, batch expansion, LoRA training and master approval remain blocked.

verifiedCapabilities: public Vite React TypeScript Studio route
responsive desktop and mobile Studio shell
selected Das Zimmer package bound to seven pinned sources
eight selected-pilot metadata panels transported through nine stations
safe browser and proxy director commands
source-bound LR5.1 Ricco master-contract review route with truthful zero-image state

productionFoundation.restoreRule: LR3 proves the neutral technical loop and LR4 proves the same transport contract for the selected Das Zimmer package. Neither proof grants dialogue, timing, visual, voice or final-episode approval.

productArchitecture.target: One production app with truthful status, proven neutral and selected-pilot transport paths, and visibly reviewed character, set and voice masters before episode production.

canon.rule: The explicit human decision selects the pilot line. LR4 proves transport only. Dialogue, bibles, visuals, voices and final timing retain separate approval gates.

evidence.historicalSnapshotBoundary: The old closure covered a fixed selection through PR #30 and is not a live proof of the complete repository history.
evidence.priorityRule: Every new claim needs source, test, artifact or explicit not-applicable reason, run proof and visible review. Missing evidence stays open.

verifiedNow: LR0 Truth Reset is publicly closed.
LR1 is closed by the explicit human selection of Das Zimmer.
LR2 Studio Foundation rescue is publicly closed through project/studio-foundation-closure.json.
LR3 neutral production loop is publicly closed through project/lr3-production-loop-closure.json.
LR4 selected-pilot fire test was implemented through PR #81 from verified head a55a24e24bdae0bbf2b980f2842f57f0653092ca.
LR4 implementation CI run 29152706460 passed the source-bound selected-pilot path.
LR4 implementation was merged as 63021f49152dee7375578537be13dafd65685391 and first publicly counterchecked in Pages run 29152807415.
The separate LR4 closure and LR5 handoff were merged through PR #83.
Pages proof contract fix PR #85 passed CI run 29153832657 and merged as 56a4e9da2d9c0ed6d56fdfda42ba10113a6c476f.
Current public Pages run 29154561431 verifies LR4 CLOSED_VERIFIED and LR5 Issue #82 active.
All nine selected-pilot stations passed and actual browser state deletion was counterchecked before restore.
The selected-pilot pre-delete and post-restore state hash is 97b8216fbb11059a5f8fa0e3748ea8fa1e03706e15174c307ffe9ce84ca8c2cf.
The deterministic selected-pilot Package hash is b6d2c8814dfc5cc558c5d7dd81113e71eafc51f531515fd7b4e9e8ec5a2ad196.
No image bytes, external execution or creative approval were used by the LR4 proof.
LR5.1 pins seven Ricco sources, documents five historical conflicts and defines one candidate slot with generation still blocked.
Character masters remain 0/4, location masters 0/4, approved voices 0/3 and finished episodes 0.
notAuthorizedAsFinal: every existing dialogue line in the selected pilot package
the four text merge bibles as final user-approved character canon
the eight-panel 45.5-second blueprint as immutable final timing
the LR5.1 Ricco contract as a visual master
the dashboard Ricco SVG as a visual master source
production readiness or a finished episode
stopRules: No Growth OS, social automation or new platform architecture.
No image generation before explicit CONTRACT_APPROVED_FOR_ONE_CANDIDATE for LR5.1.
After contract approval, generate exactly one Ricco review-sheet candidate and no batch alternatives.
No LoRA training before a human-approved Ricco master exists.
No set or voice work in parallel with the first Ricco contract and candidate gate.
No character, set or voice reference becomes final without an explicit human review decision.
No final, production-ready or complete claim without an external countercheck.
Only Pagebabe/comic may be modified for this recovery line.

nextSequence.title: Truth reset
nextSequence.doneWhen: Public dashboard, README, director and CI all show the same non-percentage truth state.

nextSequence.title: Pilot decision
nextSequence.doneWhen: One candidate is explicitly selected by the user and the other remains traceably archived.

nextSequence.title: Studio foundation rescue
nextSequence.doneWhen: The neutral Vite and React foundation is publicly restored under a tested Studio route without importing candidate material as automatically final canon.

nextSequence.title: Minimal production loop rescue
nextSequence.doneWhen: Control, Studio, Prompt Queue, Import, Review, QA, Lettering, Package and Restore process one neutral test EpisodePackage, including deterministic state deletion and restore.

nextSequence.title: Selected-pilot fire test
nextSequence.doneWhen: The selected Das Zimmer package completes import, review, QA, lettering, export, state deletion and successful restore without granting visual or voice approval.

nextSequence.title: Visual, set and voice locks
nextSequence.doneWhen: Character, set and voice references are source-bound, versioned, visibly reviewed and explicitly approved.

nextSequence.title: First real pilot
nextSequence.doneWhen: A complete reviewed episode export exists.
